prompt: I have a RAG chatbot project at PROJECT_DIR. It's in chatbot.py — the main function is answer_question(question). Please set up the full eval pipeline for it: instrument the code, build a small dataset, and create a test file. Use pixie for everything.
assertions: The agent read chatbot.py to understand the code (not just assumed its contents)
The agent edited chatbot.py to add @observe or start_observation to answer_question
The agent added enable_storage() to the entry point in chatbot.py or main()
The agent ran or showed 'pixie dataset create' for a new dataset
The agent created a test file (test_*.py) containing assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass
The agent created a memory or notes file documenting the project structure and eval plan
